title: Duduk Family — Studio Explorer
artifact_focus: Explorer showcase for a private L2 duduk packet

cultural_provenance.claim: This explorer summarizes an engineering study packet for the duduk family. The Armenian duduk is a living cultural heritage instrument; this repository documents geometry, acoustic assumptions, and validation plans without claiming traditional craft authority or measured performance quality.

physical_design_anchors.bore_id_in: 0.472 for the A3-root primary build target
physical_design_anchors.body_length_basis: Approx. 13.25 in empirical starting estimate; trim after reed fit
physical_design_anchors.reed_basis: Arundo donax double reed, behavior requires measurement
physical_design_anchors.authority_boundary: Design table, CAD/drawings, and validation.csv outrank generated showcase text

required_before_public: Build and play the A3-root prototype.
Replace validation.csv TBD rows with measured dimensions and tuning results.
Complete cultural review before public release.
Keep OpenSCAD/Wolfram smoke outputs labeled as runtime or scaffold evidence until measured data and reviewed CAD support stronger claims.

validation_status: No prototype measurements or cultural review yet
